items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Account hierarchy graph with relationship types', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the business process but do not include any checks or reads related to the account hierarchy or its relationship types. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
